title: Score
description: Matcher rates received SKUs by comparing the data sent by sellers to existing fields in the marketplace. The calculation of these scores determines whether the product has been: `Approved` or `Denied`.

Approve.description: Insert in this field the desired minimum score to approve SKUs. If this field is set as 99, it means all approvals will be made manually.

Reject.description: Insert in this field the desired maximum score to reject SKUs.
